title: Halo around the moon
observation: A large, faint ring of light circling the moon at night.
effect: High-altitude ice crystals are present, signaling a change in air mass.

title: Ants moving their eggs
observation: Ants frantically transporting their eggs to higher ground.
effect: The colony senses an upcoming flood or prolonged saturated soil conditions.

title: Sun dogs appearing
observation: Bright spots of light appearing on either side of the sun.
effect: Light is refracting through suspended ice crystals, often predicting a weather shift.

title: Fish jumping at the surface
observation: Fish repeatedly breaking the water's surface in still conditions.
effect: Changing barometric pressure is affecting the oxygen levels in the water.

title: Sharp, clear mountain views
observation: Distances seem shorter and horizons appear exceptionally crisp.
effect: The air has very low moisture and particulate content, usually preceding cold air.
